name: Graphics
description: Set up the display. depth = bitplanes (1–5), giving 2^depth colours. Must be called before any drawing.

name: Cls
description: Clear the back buffer using the blitter. Fill colour is set by ClsColor.

name: ClsColor
description: Set the palette index used by Cls to fill the background. Default is 0 (black).

name: Color
description: Set the current drawing colour to a palette index (0–31). Used by Plot, Line, Rect, Box, and Text.

name: PaletteColor
description: Set palette entry n. r, g, b are OCS 4-bit values (0–15). Takes effect at the next ScreenFlip.

name: WaitVbl
description: Wait for the next vertical blank without flipping buffers. Useful for timing-only synchronisation.

name: Text
description: Draw a string at (x, y) using the current font and colour. Supports newlines.

name: End
description: Exit the program immediately and restore the OS.

name: Delay
description: Pause for the given number of frames (1 frame ≈ 20 ms PAL / 17 ms NTSC).

name: Plot
description: Draw a single pixel at (x, y) in the current colour.

name: Line
description: Draw a line from (x1, y1) to (x2, y2) in the current colour.

name: Rect
description: Draw a hollow rectangle outline at (x, y) with the given width and height.

name: Box
description: Draw a filled rectangle at (x, y) with the given width and height using the blitter.

name: WaitKey
description: Halt execution until a key is pressed. Uses interrupt-driven CIA-A keyboard input.

name: ScreenFlip
description: Swap front and back buffers. Call once per frame after all drawing is done. Also triggers the copper-list swap.

name: CopperColor
description: Change the background colour (COLOR00) at scanline y via the copper. r, g, b are 0–15. Enables raster bars.

name: LoadSample
description: Register a raw PCM audio sample. File must be 8-bit unsigned, mono. Only declares the asset — no chip RAM is used until PlaySample.

name: PlaySample
description: Play a sample on Paula channel 0–3, looping continuously. period controls pitch (lower = higher pitch; 428 ≈ middle C). volume is 0–64.

name: PlaySampleOnce
description: Play a sample once on Paula channel 0–3, then go silent. Uses the same period/volume convention as PlaySample.

name: StopSample
description: Stop DMA playback on Paula channel 0–3 immediately.

name: LoadImage
description: Load a raw planar image from disk into chip RAM. width/height must match the actual image dimensions.

name: DrawImage
description: Draw a loaded image at (x, y). Optional frame selects a frame from an animation strip (0-based).

name: PokeB
description: Write an 8-bit value to an absolute hardware address. No bounds checking — direct chip register access.

name: PokeW
description: Write a 16-bit value to an absolute hardware address. Address should be word-aligned.

name: PokeL
description: Write a 32-bit value to an absolute hardware address. Address should be longword-aligned.

name: Poke
description: Alias for PokeL. Write a 32-bit value to an absolute hardware address.

name: SetBackground
description: Set the image used as the static background for Bob restore. Must be called before any DrawBob.

name: LoadMask
description: Load a 1-bpp mask file for a Bob image. The mask determines which pixels are transparent during DrawBob.

name: DrawBob
description: Queue a Bob (blitter object) to be drawn at (x, y). Optional frame for animated bobs. Bobs are flushed automatically before ScreenFlip.

name: LoadAnimImage
description: Load an animation strip. frameCount sets how many frames are in the strip; each frame is width×height pixels.

name: LoadTileset
description: Load an interleaved tileset (.iraw). tileW/tileH define the size of a single tile in pixels. The file contains all tiles stacked vertically (tile 0 at top). tile count = file_height / tileH.

name: LoadTilemap
description: Load a binary tilemap file (.bmap). Format: 8-byte header (map_width, map_height, tile_w, tile_h as words) followed by map_width*map_height tile-index words (0-based, row-major).

name: DrawTilemap
description: Render the visible portion of a tilemap into the back buffer. scrollX/scrollY are the camera position in pixels (0,0 = top-left). Tile dimensions and map size are read from the tilemap header at runtime.

name: SetTilemap
description: Register a tilemap+tileset pair as the active scrolling background for Bob restore. Replaces SetBackground. Must be called before DrawBob when using a tilemap background.

name: LoadFont
description: Load a raw font image. chars defines the character set order in the image; charW/charH define glyph size in pixels.

name: UseFont
description: Switch to a previously loaded font. Omit index to revert to the built-in 8×8 font.
